productName: Melon Ball ( S/H ) - Flipside Gold BHO/Ethanol Extracted Disposable 1g
description: This hybrid disposable carries Melon Ball in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Simple, smooth, portable, a light, refreshing melon flavor, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
